emails.subject: Status of Completed Performance Reviews
emails.body: I hope the data on these performance reviews is wrong. I think we need 100% of reviews done. Do you agree. Forwarded by John J Lavorato/Corp/Enron on 09/27/2000 09:02 AM From: Sheila Knudsen 09/14/2000 09:20 PM

emails.subject: Status of Completed Performance Reviews
emails.body: John, completely agree with your view David, I would have the matrix, with all of the ENA statistics and names, ready for distribution on Friday to the key managers to try and illicit a response from the low participation folks. Regards Delainey Forwarded by David W Delainey/HOU/ECT on 09/27/2000 12:16 PM John J Lavorato@ENRON 09/27/2000 09:08 AM
